original_query: select count(*) from ((select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from store_sales, date_dim, customer        where store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and ss_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from catalog_sales, date_dim, customer        where catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and cs_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from web_sales, date_dim, customer        where web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and ws_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          ) ) cool_cust ;
rewritten_query: select count(*) from ((select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from store_sales, date_dim, customer        where store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and ss_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from catalog_sales, date_dim, customer        where catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and cs_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from web_sales, date_dim, customer        where web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and ws_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          ) ) cool_cust ;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Replace EXCEPT operations with NOT EXISTS subqueries to allow the optimizer to use anti-joins, which can be more efficient than set operations.
Replace implicit joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially better optimization.
